channel.title: Michael Burry — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: Michael Burry: ADDED BABA (+30%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) added BABA in Q4 2025 · 28.4% of portfolio. Doubling down again on the Alibaba contrarian bet.

item.title: Michael Burry: ADDED JD (+18%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) added JD in Q4 2025 · 19.7% of portfolio. More China tech.

item.title: Michael Burry: ADDED GOLD (+55%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) added GOLD in Q4 2025 · 7.2% of portfolio. Adding to the Barrick Gold macro hedge.

item.title: Michael Burry: TRIMMED SHEL (-30%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) trimmed SHEL in Q4 2025 · 6.1% of portfolio. Taking Shell profits.

item.title: Michael Burry: ADDED BABA (+40%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) added BABA in Q3 2025 · 21.3% of portfolio. Doubled the Alibaba bet.

item.title: Michael Burry: ADDED JD (+25%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) added JD in Q3 2025 · 17.6% of portfolio. Same China thesis, deeper discount.

item.title: Michael Burry: TRIMMED BIDU (-20%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) trimmed BIDU in Q3 2025 · 14.8% of portfolio. Reduced Baidu to fund BABA add.

item.title: Michael Burry: NEW POSITION GOLD · Q3 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) new position GOLD in Q3 2025 · 5.2% of portfolio. New Barrick Gold position — macro hedge.

item.title: Michael Burry: NEW POSITION NVDA (+100%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) new position NVDA (NVIDIA CORPORATION) in Q3 2025 · 13.5% of portfolio.

item.title: Michael Burry: NEW POSITION PFE (+100%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) new position PFE (PFIZER INC) in Q3 2025 · 11.1% of portfolio.

item.title: Michael Burry: NEW POSITION SLM (+100%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) new position SLM (SLM CORP) in Q3 2025 · 1.0% of portfolio.

item.title: Michael Burry: EXITED UNH (-100%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) exited UNH (UNITEDHEALTH GROUP INC) in Q3 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.

item.title: Michael Burry: EXITED META (-100%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) exited META (META PLATFORMS INC) in Q3 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.

item.title: Michael Burry: ADDED BABA (+35%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) added BABA in Q2 2025 · 15.2% of portfolio. First major BABA add — 3 Q consecutive.

item.title: Michael Burry: ADDED JD (+20%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) added JD in Q2 2025 · 14.1% of portfolio. Building JD.com.

item.title: Michael Burry: NEW POSITION UNH (+100%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) new position UNH (UNITEDHEALTH GROUP INC) in Q2 2025 · 20.0% of portfolio.

item.title: Michael Burry: NEW POSITION META (+100%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) new position META (META PLATFORMS INC) in Q2 2025 · 12.8% of portfolio.

item.title: Michael Burry: EXITED NVDA (-100%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) exited NVDA (NVIDIA CORPORATION) in Q2 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.

item.title: Michael Burry: EXITED PDD (-100%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) exited PDD (PDD HOLDINGS INC) in Q2 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.

item.title: Michael Burry: EXITED BAIDU (-100%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) exited BAIDU (BAIDU INC) in Q2 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.

item.title: Michael Burry: NEW POSITION BABA · Q1 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) new position BABA in Q1 2025 · 11.2% of portfolio. Burry re-entered BABA here.

item.title: Michael Burry: NEW POSITION NVDA (+100%) · Q1 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) new position NVDA (NVIDIA CORPORATION) in Q1 2025 · 49.0% of portfolio.

item.title: Michael Burry: ADDED PDD (+167%) · Q1 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) added PDD (PDD HOLDINGS INC) in Q1 2025 · 11.9% of portfolio.

item.title: Michael Burry: TRIMMED BAIDU (-20%) · Q1 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) trimmed BAIDU (BAIDU INC) in Q1 2025 · 4.6% of portfolio.

item.title: Michael Burry: EXITED HCA (-100%) · Q1 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) exited HCA (HCA HEALTHCARE INC) in Q1 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.

item.title: Michael Burry: ADDED BABA (+30%) · Q4 2024
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) added BABA in Q4 2024 · 11.5% of portfolio. BABA contrarian build accelerating.

item.title: Michael Burry: ADDED JD (+25%) · Q4 2024
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) added JD in Q4 2024 · 10.8% of portfolio. JD.com add.

item.title: Michael Burry: TRIMMED BAIDU (-40%) · Q4 2024
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) trimmed BAIDU (BAIDU INC) in Q4 2024 · 13.6% of portfolio.

item.title: Michael Burry: NEW POSITION PDD (+100%) · Q4 2024
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) new position PDD (PDD HOLDINGS INC) in Q4 2024 · 9.4% of portfolio.

item.title: Michael Burry: NEW POSITION HCA (+100%) · Q4 2024
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) new position HCA (HCA HEALTHCARE INC) in Q4 2024 · 5.8% of portfolio.

item.title: Michael Burry: NEW POSITION BABA · Q3 2024
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) new position BABA in Q3 2024 · 8.5% of portfolio. Burry's BABA re-entry.

item.title: Michael Burry: NEW POSITION JD · Q3 2024
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) new position JD in Q3 2024 · 7.6% of portfolio. First JD.com position.

item.title: Michael Burry: ADDED BAIDU (+178%) · Q3 2024
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) added BAIDU (BAIDU INC) in Q3 2024 · 16.9% of portfolio.

item.title: Michael Burry: EXITED BABA · Q2 2024
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) exited BABA in Q2 2024. Briefly exited BABA before re-entering Q3.

item.title: Michael Burry: ADDED BAIDU (+88%) · Q2 2024
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) added BAIDU (BAIDU INC) in Q2 2024 · 12.4% of portfolio.

item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) exited HCA (HCA HEALTHCARE INC) in Q2 2024 · 0.0% of portfolio.
